## Summary

What should be added?

## User workflow

Who will use it, and where in the app or deployment flow does it fit?

## Operations value

How does this help installation, support, backup, security, or daily business operations?

## Data and security impact

Does this affect local files, NAS/shared files, backups, personal data, or permissions?
